summary: Verified requirements.txt cleanup (124→29 packages). Fresh venv install succeeded with exit 0 and no conflicts. pip check clean. server.py imported cleanly with 66 routes (>60). All runtime smoke tests pass against live backend (health, login, /me, catalog/symptoms, journal create+delete, awards/progress). Stripe 15.0.1, resend, and motor all importable in fresh venv. All non-stdlib imports in server.py are covered by requirements.txt.

tests_executed.1_fresh_install_exit_code: PASS - pip install exited 0, no conflict warnings, 29 packages installed
tests_executed.3_server_module_import: PASS - server.app.routes == 66 (>=60 expected) with MONGO_URL/DB_NAME/JWT_SECRET envs only
tests_executed.8_journal_create: PASS - 200 (Note: endpoint accepts 'text' field, not 'content'. Review-request payload {content:...} returns 422; fixed test to use {text:...} which matches server.py JournalCreate model)
tests_executed.12_resend_import: PASS - imports cleanly in fresh venv
tests_executed.13_motor_import: PASS - AsyncIOMotorClient imports cleanly in fresh venv
tests_executed.14_file_integrity_imports: PASS - all non-stdlib imports in server.py backed by requirements.txt: dotenv(python-dotenv), fastapi, starlette, motor, pydantic+EmailStr(email-validator), bcrypt, httpx, jwt(PyJWT), resend, stripe. uvicorn(supervisor entry), python-multipart(UploadFile/Form) and requests(stripe/resend transitive) also present.

action_items: Note for future review-request authors: /api/journal accepts field 'text' (per server.py JournalCreate model), not 'content'. The review-request example payload {"content":"..."} would have returned 422. Test file updated to use correct field name.
requirements.txt cleanup is safe to deploy. No further action needed.
critical_code_review_comments: requirements.txt now minimal and matches server.py imports; unused SDKs (openai, google-*, litellm, boto3, aiohttp, numpy, pandas, pillow, jinja2, etc.) correctly removed.
All version pins retained match what backend has been running with (verified via live runtime tests).
seed_data_creation: None - test creates + deletes journal entry inline
context_for_next_testing_agent: requirements.txt is at 29 packages and validated for Render redeploy. Fresh venv at /tmp/venv_test2 available if needed. Pytest smoke file at /app/backend/tests/test_requirements_smoke.py reusable for regression.
